title: Patch v0.9.4 — Economy Tune + Loot Pass
summary: Trader spreads tightened, rare loot moved, and helicopter crash tables adjusted.
content:
### Added
- New mid-tier barter options for building materials.

### Changed
- Trader spreads reduced on essentials.
- Loot tables rebalanced to reduce early-game snowball.

### Fixed
- Duplicate item spawns in 2 coastal zones.

### Known Issues
- Occasional base ramp placement clipping (tracked).

title: Roadmap: March Wipe Prep
summary: Focus: performance stability, economy balance, and repeatable weekend events.
content:
This month we’re prioritizing:

- **Performance stability** in hotspots
- **Economy balance** (less inflation, tighter loops)
- **Events pipeline** so weekends hit different

Track progress in the **Tasks** tab.
